# OSLGetErrDescUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `OSLGetErrDescProcPtr` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias OSLGetErrDescUPP = OSLGetErrDescProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of a get error descriptor callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslgeterrdescprocptr].
title: OSLGetErrDescUPP
